name: Liverschnetzel
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the liver and dry it with paper towel. Cut into small strips. Season with Maggi.
2. Heat butter in a skillet and brown the liver until it is brown-grey. This will be fast; remove and keep warm.
3. Peel and cut the apple into small pieces. Cut the pineapple the same way.
4. Sauté the fruits in the pan, add water and the package of dry gravy.
5. Bring to a boil; add the liver; heat again. Add the sour cream and heat, but do not let it boil.
6. Serve with wide noodles or rice or mashed potatoes or bread and a green salad.
